channel.title: HackerNews 日本語まとめ & AI要約
channel.description: HackerNewsのトップ記事を毎日日本語翻訳・AI要約して配信

item.title: 2026年6月2日（23:00取得） HackerNews トップ記事
item.description: #1 The newest Instagram “exploit” is the goofiest I've seen #2 AI Agent Guidelines for CS336 at Stanford #3 GitHub and the Crime Against Software #4 Lifelike biochemistry continued to unfold in sterilized soil #5 Should you normalize RGB values by 255 or 256? #6 CS336: Language Modeling from Scratch #7 Ask HN: Who is hiring? (June 2026) #8 I made my phone slow on purpose #9 A 10 year old Xeon is all you need #10 Ask HN: Who wants to be hired? (June 2026)
